n: The Restless Orcs of the Crack's Edge

steps.t: Orcs can be found surrounding the Crack's Edge in Nud-melek, near the sundered Bridge of Khazad-dûm. You should interrogate Orcs to find out what happ…
Svanr can be found at the shattered Bridge of Khazad-dûm on the west edge of the chasm in Nud-melek. You should speak with Svanr.
